text.message: I mean.. black smashes long term.. look at the ports

can you do insurance with that?

to sub for my no wheat no ore setup :)
pretty good set up if you ask me
orange is army pacing with no comp and 5 pts
all you need is the occasional 10 for double pops
3 ore and hes got excess wheat
I mean.. you can argue all you want but you're on every sheep spot about to get the port
with the lack of my ore wheat yes the sheep port will sub for it
Id take your setup over mine all day long
idk what your doing tbh black respectfully
why are oyu trading him settle
red you're essentially at 6 with road
then you have the port you're about to settle
the table talk is actually insulting
and clearly trying to double play for the win
lol oh please don't go there XD lololol
you go to 8 with a knight flip and your talking as if your in a bad spot
i cant believe this table talk and you got everyone buying it haha
so are you feeding the plow?
ye triggered how low elo this table is
if you win Im reporting you
i didnt play last season ahahha
last season i plkayed was season 10 go check
and i was top 50 with the best win rate in top 100
i just came back after a year off
practically king making how bad youve played this
